title: Add BigramHash module: lightweight n-gram logit bias via hash embedding
author: tigertonez

data.description: Injects shallow bigram statistics into model logits via a learned hash embedding table

novel_contributions: Introduction of BigramHash module to add n-gram logit bias via hash embedding
Use of Knuth multiplicative hash to map bigrams to logit bias vectors
Zero initialization for no-op start and incremental learning
Aggressive int4 quantization to fit embedding table within artifact budget (~16MB)
